prompt:
A high-resolution cinematic storyboard collage composed of 20 sequential frames (4x5 grid), designed as continuous screenshots from a premium fashion advertisement video.

The same young male model appears consistently in all frames, wearing a clean, modern t-shirt with the brand name “Lyntilla” clearly visible on the chest in minimal, stylish typography.

The frames follow a natural motion progression like a real video sequence:

Row 1 (Intro – Establishing):
1.Wide shot – model walking into frame on an urban street
2.Mid-wide – approaching camera
3.Medium shot – slow confident walk
4.Slight turn – natural motion blur
5.Close-up – face + upper torso, calm expression

Row 2 (Engagement – Movement):
6. Adjusting collar (hands in motion)
7. Looking sideways, candid moment
8. Wind blowing t-shirt slightly
9. Hands in pocket, relaxed stance
10. Walking past camera (motion blur edge frame)

Row 3 (Detail – Product Focus):
11. Close-up of “Lyntilla” logo on chest
12. Fabric texture macro shot
13. Slight stretch of fabric showing quality
14. Over-the-shoulder glance
15. Side profile with soft light

Row 4 (Lifestyle – Emotion):
16. Sitting casually on urban steps
17. Laughing candid moment
18. Leaning against wall, streetwear vibe
19. Low-angle power pose (hero energy)
20. Final hero shot – direct eye contact, strong confident stance

⸻

🎥 Visual Style & Consistency
•Ultra-cinematic fashion ad style
•Golden hour + soft diffused lighting mix
•Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh
•Subtle motion blur in transitional frames
•Warm, filmic color grading (slightly desaturated luxury tones)
•Clean urban + minimal studio hybrid backgrounds
•Consistent outfit, lighting continuity, and character identity
